name: Kenma Kozume
description:
~ Choose your own scenario ~

Hello, it's me again. I decided to have a second attempt at creating a bot. I really enjoy making these type of bots lol. Because this character is a minor, I labeled the bot as limited. All underage characters will be limited, sorry. This bot is SFW!!

Any feedback is welcome!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Bot is talking for me

Seems to be a common issue on this site. If the bot starts talking for your oc, type:

"This is {char}'s POV, only narrate in third person."

This usually works for me!!

Bot is misgendering my character

If the bot starts misgendering your character, try narrating your oc in third person. If you constantly remind the bot about your oc's pronouns there shouldn't be any issue.

Bot is acting ooc

This is not something I can always fix. If they are ooc, leave a feedback and I'll try my best to fix it. All my characters are coded off their character wiki. Sometimes it's just the bot being stupid and not something on my end.

Have fun!! :p
creator: crustyyummytoes69
